headline: Darling Ingredients vs. Tyson Foods: Which Stock Stands Out?

headline: Flowers Foods' Q1 Sales Increase: Can Nature's Own Drive More?
summary: FLO's Q1 sales rise 1.1% as the Nature's Own relaunch bets on simpler ingredients, Non-GMO verification and half loaves to revive bread demand.

headline: 4 Defensive Stocks to Take Refuge in as Consumer Confidence Tanks
summary: Consumer confidence fell in May as inflation fears rose; Atmos Energy, CMS Energy, New York Times and Tyson Foods offer defense.
